name: logo-mark
purpose: Ícone do repositório no GitHub + fonte para favicon e app icon
prompt: A minimal logo mark for 'Voca', an AI voice tool. Square format 512x512. Background: deep forest green #0d2218. Center: an abstract waveform symbol made of 5 vertical bars of varying heights (pattern: short, medium, tall, medium, short — like an audio equalizer), rendered in electric mint #4ade80. Bars are rounded at tops, evenly spaced, proportional. Below the waveform: the letter 'V' in a geometric sans-serif, same mint color, small. Entire mark is centered with generous padding. Ultra-minimal, icon-ready, recognizable at 32px.
negative_prompt: complex illustration, gradients, shadows, multiple colors, photorealistic, text beyond the letter V, decorative swirls, 3D

model_hints.dalle3: Vector-style icon. Exact colors only. Transparent or dark background.
